config.llm_guardian.disabled_desc: Enable to add an LLM-based security layer that evaluates tool calls before execution. Uses a fast, cheap model to detect suspicious operations. Falls back to the main LLM if no provider is selected.
config.llm_guardian.provider_desc: Select a provider for the Guardian LLM. A fast, cheap model (e.g. Gemini Flash, GPT-4o-mini, local 3B) is recommended for sub-second decisions.
config.llm_guardian.level_desc: Controls which tool calls are sent to the Guardian for review. Higher levels check more operations but cost more tokens.
config.llm_guardian.level_low: Baixo — Apenas ferramentas de alto risco (shell, sudo, python)
config.llm_guardian.level_high: Alto — Cada chamada de ferramenta verificada
config.llm_guardian.failsafe_desc: What happens when the Guardian LLM is unavailable or returns an error (timeout, rate limit, etc.).
config.llm_guardian.failsafe_quarantine: Quarentena — Permitir mas registrar e avisar
config.llm_guardian.perf_desc: Cache and rate limiting settings to control costs and latency.
config.llm_guardian.overrides_desc: Override the protection level for specific tools. Useful to always check dangerous tools or skip safe ones.
config.llm_guardian.clarification_desc: Quando ativado, o agente pode fornecer uma justificação se uma chamada de ferramenta for bloqueada. O Guardian reavalia a solicitação uma vez com a justificação antes de tomar uma decisão final.
config.llm_guardian.scan_desc: Use the Guardian LLM to scan incoming content (emails, webhooks) for prompt injection, phishing, and social engineering attacks — beyond the built-in regex patterns.
